author: y4rr
content: [action] Phase 5 dispatch: Conv2d::new_full(in,out,kernel,stride,padding,dilation,groups,bias). Conv2d::new becomes shim (groups=1, dilation=(1,1)). CPU-only forward+backward for groups>1 / dilation>1. GPU stays unchanged with explicit dispatch gate. Probe-before-fix mandatory. Caller-survey expected zero-changes (shim preserves semantics).
